metadata.title: Translate PDF Online
metadata.description: Layout-preserving PDF translation in your browser. Many language pairs; HTTPS delivery and time-limited file retention.
metadata.keywords: pdf translation, layout preserving pdf, translate pdf online, multilingual pdf, academic pdf translation, babeldoc, deepseek
